TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == kakiliman == Taywan tulu u satabakiay a pakilangan i kalipunan tu1890 a mihcan pikuwan henay nu lipun ku Taywan hawsa, sibalucu' tu a mipatadas tu buyu' nu Taywan, u kamu nu tau tu tuluay a pakilangan, nituzu'an sa uynian u "nialisan a pakilangan. nilaculan taypinsan pakilangan atu pasin pakilangan". satu i kalipunan pikuwan nu lipan titaan u Taywan hawsa, malingatu tu patadas tu buyu' a mikilang u kahenulan nu lipun ku pakilangan. itawya i kalipunan yadah ku niketunay tu satabakiay u kasatiman atu matekesay a kilang nu Taywan, na milawat tu piketun tu kilangan henay hawsa, maluayaw tu maculu' patayza i lipun mala u sapisanga' nu heni tu luma', ayza pazuma hantu ku situngusa u Cung huwa min kuw satalakawayan kalukday linu'ci satu, au i cuwaay a kilangkilangan nu buyu'a kenis auyzaan tu ku mikuwanay. Taywan tuluay a pakilangan u saayaway a patadas hawsa i Alisan, i 1912 a mihcaan malingatu misakilang ku lipun, sakatusa i 1915 a mihcaanu Pasin a pakilangan, sakatulu i 1916 a mihcaan u taypinsan a pakilangan. uyni na pakilangan u palecad tu kaahebal a kayadah ku kilang sa, u saayaway ku Alisan a pakilangan, sakatusa u Taypinsan a pakilangan, sakatulu u Pasin a pakilangan.Taywan nazikuzan nu lipun kyami hawsa zayhan nazikuzan na mangangayaw madih a misebek miletek tu kilang. i kahulaman tu 47 a mihcaan katukuh i 65 a mihcaan u pikilanga a mihcaan.paymihcaan piketun tu kilang hawsa mangasiw tu cacay a lasubu mang adepah, katukuh i 52 a mihcaan tu nu kasumamada i 1963 a mihcaan masatesep tu miketun tu kilang, mahizasa paliyucan tu mala u nu kilakilangan tu a piidangan. alisan a pakilangan hani aca i kalipunan uyni cacay tuluay a pakilangan ku satabakiay u singanganay aca, satu itiza u sangaleb satu yadah ku canancanan u mulangaway milaladay a mauzipay, kanatal nu mita yadah tu ku talakaway a buyu' azihan ya ladem mahiza u bayu, ka salungan, kanihalan, atu kalabiyan salungan azihen ku hekal, ayza alisan mala u sakanamuhan kakaydihan tu nu labang tayza midang, i Taypakay a taypinsan atu Pasin a buyu kilul satu misumad mala u piidangan tunu kilakilangan a buyu', a pawasa tu binawlan sakapahay piidangan nu kilakilangan a buyu', mala u kakaydihan tu nu labanng a katayzan. nisulitan namakayniay a nasulitan nasakamuan atu natinengan Taywan YoutubeŤ™ćŤ≠ėŚŹįÁĀ£šłČŚ§ßśěóŚ†ī nasulitan ni Sabak Tutuy i 2019 a mihcaan itiza i hupu a niyazu'
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == tajwan tur~…ĺu u satabakiaj a pakir~…ĺaŇčan i kar~…ĺipunan tu**** a mińß ¶an pikuwan ńß…ônaj nu r~…ĺipun ku tajwan ńßawsa, sibar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° tu a mipatadas tu buju Ē~ ° nu tajwan, u kamu nu tau tu tur~…ĺuaj a pakir~…ĺaŇčan, nituzu Ē~ °an sa ujnian u "niar~…ĺisan a pakir~…ĺaŇčan. nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan tajpinsan pakir~…ĺaŇčan atu pasin pakir~…ĺaŇčan". satu i kar~…ĺipunan pikuwan nu r~…ĺipan titaan u tajwan ńßawsa, mar~…ĺiŇčatu tu patadas tu buju Ē~ ° a mikir~…ĺaŇč u kańß…ônur~…ĺan nu r~…ĺipun ku pakir~…ĺaŇčan. itawja i kar~…ĺipunan jadańß ku nik…ôtunaj tu satabakiaj u kasatiman atu mat…ôk…ôsaj a kir~…ĺaŇč nu tajwan, na mir~…ĺawat tu pik…ôtun tu kir~…ĺaŇčan ńß…ônaj ńßawsa, mar~…ĺuajaw tu ma ¶ur~…ĺu Ē~ ° patajza i r~…ĺipun mar~…ĺa u sapisaŇča Ē~ ° nu ńß…ôni tu r~…ĺuma Ē~ °, ajza pazuma ńßantu ku situŇčusa u ¶uŇč ńßuwa min kuw satar~…ĺakawajan kar~…ĺukdaj r~…ĺinu Ē~ ° ¶i satu, au i ¶uwaaj a kir~…ĺaŇčkir~…ĺaŇčan nu buju Ē~ °a k…ônis aujzaan tu ku mikuwanaj. tajwan tur~…ĺuaj a pakir~…ĺaŇčan u saajawaj a patadas ńßawsa i ar~…ĺisan, i **** a mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺiŇčatu misakir~…ĺaŇč ku r~…ĺipun, sakatusa i **** a mińß ¶aanu pasin a pakir~…ĺaŇčan, sakatur~…ĺu i **** a mińß ¶aan u tajpinsan a pakir~…ĺaŇčan. ujni na pakir~…ĺaŇčan u par~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu kaańß…ôbar~…ĺ a kajadańß ku kir~…ĺaŇč sa, u saajawaj ku ar~…ĺisan a pakir~…ĺaŇčan, sakatusa u tajpinsan a pakir~…ĺaŇčan, sakatur~…ĺu u pasin a pakir~…ĺaŇčan.tajwan nazikuzan nu r~…ĺipun kjami ńßawsa zajńßan nazikuzan na maŇčaŇčajaw madińß a mis…ôb…ôk mir~…ĺ…ôt…ôk tu kir~…ĺaŇč. i kańßur~…ĺaman tu ** a mińß ¶aan katukuńß i ** a mińß ¶aan u pikir~…ĺaŇča a mińß ¶aan.pajmińß ¶aan pik…ôtun tu kir~…ĺaŇč ńßawsa maŇčasiw tu ¶a ¶aj a r~…ĺasubu maŇč ad…ôpańß, katukuńß i ** a mińß ¶aan tu nu kasumamada i **** a mińß ¶aan masat…ôs…ôp tu mik…ôtun tu kir~…ĺaŇč, mańßizasa par~…ĺiju ¶an tu mar~…ĺa u nu kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan tu a piidaŇčan. ar~…ĺisan a pakir~…ĺaŇčan ńßani a ¶a i kar~…ĺipunan ujni ¶a ¶aj tur~…ĺuaj a pakir~…ĺaŇčan ku satabakiaj u siŇčaŇčanaj a ¶a, satu itiza u saŇčar~…ĺ…ôb satu jadańß ku ¶anan ¶anan u mur~…ĺaŇčawaj mir~…ĺar~…ĺadaj a mauzipaj, kanatar~…ĺ nu mita jadańß tu ku tar~…ĺakawaj a buju Ē~ ° azińßan ja r~…ĺad…ôm mańßiza u baju, ka sar~…ĺuŇčan, kanińßar~…ĺan, atu kar~…ĺabijan sar~…ĺuŇčan azińß…ôn ku ńß…ôkar~…ĺ, ajza ar~…ĺisan mar~…ĺa u sakanamuńßan kakajdińßan tu nu r~…ĺabaŇč tajza midaŇč, i tajpakaj a tajpinsan atu pasin a buju kir~…ĺur~…ĺ satu misumad mar~…ĺa u piidaŇčan tunu kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan a buju Ē~ °, a pawasa tu binawr~…ĺan sakapańßaj piidaŇčan nu kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan a buju Ē~ °, mar~…ĺa u kakajdińßan tu nu r~…ĺabanŇč a katajzan. nisur~…ĺitan namakajniaj a nasur~…ĺitan nasakamuan atu natin…ôŇčan tajwan joutub…ô******** nasur~…ĺitan ni sabak tutuj i **** a mińß ¶aan itiza i ńßupu a nijazu Ē~ °
S.FORM: == kakiliman == Taywan tulu u satabakiay a pakilangan i kalipunan tu1890 a mihcan pikuwan henay nu lipun ku Taywan hawsa, sibalucu' tu a mipatadas tu buyu' nu Taywan, u kamu nu tau tu tuluay a pakilangan, nituzu'an sa uynian u "nialisan a pakilangan. nilaculan taypinsan pakilangan atu pasin pakilangan". satu i kalipunan pikuwan nu lipan titaan u Taywan hawsa, malingatu tu patadas tu buyu' a mikilang u kahenulan nu lipun ku pakilangan. itawya i kalipunan yadah ku niketunay tu satabakiay u kasatiman atu matekesay a kilang nu Taywan, na milawat tu piketun tu kilangan henay hawsa, maluayaw tu maculu' patayza i lipun mala u sapisanga' nu heni tu luma', ayza pazuma hantu ku situngusa u Cung huwa min kuw satalakawayan kalukday linu'ci satu, au i cuwaay a kilangkilangan nu buyu'a kenis auyzaan tu ku mikuwanay. Taywan tuluay a pakilangan u saayaway a patadas hawsa i Alisan, i 1912 a mihcaan malingatu misakilang ku lipun, sakatusa i 1915 a mihcaanu Pasin a pakilangan, sakatulu i 1916 a mihcaan u taypinsan a pakilangan. uyni na pakilangan u palecad tu kaahebal a kayadah ku kilang sa, u saayaway ku Alisan a pakilangan, sakatusa u Taypinsan a pakilangan, sakatulu u Pasin a pakilangan.Taywan nazikuzan nu lipun kyami hawsa zayhan nazikuzan na mangangayaw madih a misebek miletek tu kilang. i kahulaman tu 47 a mihcaan katukuh i 65 a mihcaan u pikilanga a mihcaan.paymihcaan piketun tu kilang hawsa mangasiw tu cacay a lasubu mang adepah, katukuh i 52 a mihcaan tu nu kasumamada i 1963 a mihcaan masatesep tu miketun tu kilang, mahizasa paliyucan tu mala u nu kilakilangan tu a piidangan. alisan a pakilangan hani aca i kalipunan uyni cacay tuluay a pakilangan ku satabakiay u singanganay aca, satu itiza u sangaleb satu yadah ku canancanan u mulangaway milaladay a mauzipay, kanatal nu mita yadah tu ku talakaway a buyu' azihan ya ladem mahiza u bayu, ka salungan, kanihalan, atu kalabiyan salungan azihen ku hekal, ayza alisan mala u sakanamuhan kakaydihan tu nu labang tayza midang, i Taypakay a taypinsan atu Pasin a buyu kilul satu misumad mala u piidangan tunu kilakilangan a buyu', a pawasa tu binawlan sakapahay piidangan nu kilakilangan a buyu', mala u kakaydihan tu nu labanng a katayzan. nisulitan namakayniay a nasulitan nasakamuan atu natinengan Taywan YoutubeŤ™ćŤ≠ėŚŹįÁĀ£šłČŚ§ßśěóŚ†ī nasulitan ni Sabak Tutuy i 2019 a mihcaan itiza i hupu a niyazu'

tajwan, u kamu nu tau tu tur~…ĺuaj a pakir~…ĺaŇčan, nituzu Ē~ °an sa ujnian u "niar~…ĺisan a pakir~…ĺaŇčan. nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan tajpinsan pakir~…ĺaŇčan atu pasin pakir~…ĺaŇčan". satu i kar~…ĺipunan pikuwan nu r~…ĺipan titaan u tajwan ńßawsa, mar~…ĺiŇčatu tu patadas tu buju Ē~ ° a mikir~…ĺaŇč u kańß…ônur~…ĺan nu r~…ĺipun ku pakir~…ĺaŇčan. itawja i kar~…ĺipunan jadańß ku nik…ôtunaj tu satabakiaj u kasatiman atu mat…ôk…ôsaj a kir~…ĺaŇč nu tajwan, na mir~…ĺawat tu pik…ôtun tu kir~…ĺaŇčan ńß…ônaj ńßawsa, mar~…ĺuajaw tu ma ¶ur~…ĺu Ē~ ° patajza i r~…ĺipun mar~…ĺa u sapisaŇča Ē~ ° nu ńß…ôni tu r~…ĺuma Ē~ °, ajza pazuma ńßantu ku situŇčusa u ¶uŇč ńßuwa min kuw satar~…ĺakawajan kar~…ĺukdaj r~…ĺinu Ē~ ° ¶i satu, au i ¶uwaaj a kir~…ĺaŇčkir~…ĺaŇčan nu buju Ē~ °a k…ônis aujzaan tu ku mikuwanaj. tajwan tur~…ĺuaj a pakir~…ĺaŇčan u saajawaj a patadas ńßawsa i ar~…ĺisan, i **** a mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺiŇčatu misakir~…ĺaŇč ku r~…ĺipun, sakatusa i **** a mińß ¶aanu pasin a pakir~…ĺaŇčan, sakatur~…ĺu i **** a mińß ¶aan u tajpinsan a pakir~…ĺaŇčan. ujni na pakir~…ĺaŇčan u par~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu kaańß…ôbar~…ĺ a kajadańß ku kir~…ĺaŇč sa, u saajawaj ku ar~…ĺisan a pakir~…ĺaŇčan, sakatusa u tajpinsan a pakir~…ĺaŇčan, sakatur~…ĺu u pasin a pakir~…ĺaŇčan.tajwan nazikuzan nu r~…ĺipun kjami ńßawsa zajńßan nazikuzan na maŇčaŇčajaw madińß a mis…ôb…ôk mir~…ĺ…ôt…ôk tu kir~…ĺaŇč. i kańßur~…ĺaman tu ** a mińß ¶aan katukuńß i ** a mińß ¶aan u pikir~…ĺaŇča a mińß ¶aan.pajmińß ¶aan pik…ôtun tu kir~…ĺaŇč ńßawsa maŇčasiw tu ¶a ¶aj a r~…ĺasubu maŇč ad…ôpańß, katukuńß i ** a mińß ¶aan tu nu kasumamada i **** a mińß ¶aan masat…ôs…ôp tu mik…ôtun tu kir~…ĺaŇč, mańßizasa par~…ĺiju ¶an tu mar~…ĺa u nu kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan tu a piidaŇčan. ar~…ĺisan a pakir~…ĺaŇčan ńßani a ¶a i kar~…ĺipunan ujni ¶a ¶aj tur~…ĺuaj a pakir~…ĺaŇčan ku satabakiaj u siŇčaŇčanaj a ¶a, satu itiza u saŇčar~…ĺ…ôb satu jadańß ku ¶anan ¶anan u mur~…ĺaŇčawaj mir~…ĺar~…ĺadaj a mauzipaj, kanatar~…ĺ nu mita jadańß tu ku tar~…ĺakawaj a buju Ē~ ° azińßan ja r~…ĺad…ôm mańßiza u baju, ka sar~…ĺuŇčan, kanińßar~…ĺan, atu kar~…ĺabijan sar~…ĺuŇčan azińß…ôn ku ńß…ôkar~…ĺ, ajza ar~…ĺisan mar~…ĺa u sakanamuńßan kakajdińßan tu nu r~…ĺabaŇč tajza midaŇč, i tajpakaj a tajpinsan atu pasin a buju kir~…ĺur~…ĺ satu misumad mar~…ĺa u piidaŇčan tunu kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan a buju Ē~ °, a pawasa tu binawr~…ĺan sakapańßaj piidaŇčan nu kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan a buju Ē~ °, mar~…ĺa u kakajdińßan tu nu r~…ĺabanŇč a katajzan. nisur~…ĺitan namakajniaj a nasur~…ĺitan nasakamuan atu natin…ôŇčan tajwan joutub…ô******** nasur~…ĺitan ni sabak tutuj i **** a mińß ¶aan itiza i ńßupu a nijazu Ē~ °
